result.stdout:
Description:
  Utilities for working with CI unit tests.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  slice    Create a slice of unit tests to run on a parallelized CI agent.
  balance  Create a test timings file used to load balance tests.
  retry    Create a .runsettings file containing all tests that failed a previous test run.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Utilities for working with CI unit tests.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  slice    Create a slice of unit tests to run on a parallelized CI agent.
  balance  Create a test timings file used to load balance tests.
  retry    Create a .runsettings file containing all tests that failed a previous test run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a test timings file used to load balance tests.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer balance [options]

Options:
  --input-directory <input-directory> (REQUIRED)  The directory containing the .trx files to consume.
  --outfile <outfile>                             File to write the balance file to. [default: balance.xml]
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Create a test timings file used to load balance tests.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer balance [options]

Options:
  --input-directory <input-directory> (REQUIRED)  The directory containing the .trx files to consume.
  --outfile <outfile>                             File to write the balance file to. [default: balance.xml]
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a .runsettings file containing all tests that failed a previous test run.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer retry [options]

Options:
  --trx <trx> (REQUIRED)  The .trx file containing the previous run. (Can also be a directory of multiple .trx files.)
  --outfile <outfile>     File to write the .runsettings file to. [default: run-settings.txt]
  --out-trx <out-trx>     File to write updated .trx file to. (Will replace input if not specified, not valid if --trx is a directory.) []
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Create a .runsettings file containing all tests that failed a previous test run.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer retry [options]

Options:
  --trx <trx> (REQUIRED)  The .trx file containing the previous run. (Can also be a directory of multiple .trx files.)
  --outfile <outfile>     File to write the .runsettings file to. [default: run-settings.txt]
  --out-trx <out-trx>     File to write updated .trx file to. (Will replace input if not specified, not valid if --trx is a directory.) []
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a slice of unit tests to run on a parallelized CI agent.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer slice [options]

Options:
  --test-assembly <test-assembly> (REQUIRED)  The NUnit test assembly to slice.
  --slice-number <slice-number> (REQUIRED)    The (1-based) index of the desired slice.
  --total-slices <total-slices> (REQUIRED)    The total number of desired slices.
  --outfile <outfile>                         File to write the .runsettings file to. [default: run-settings.txt]
  --test-filter <test-filter>                 Optional NUnit test filter query. []
  --balance-file <balance-file>               Optional test timings file used for load balancing. []
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Create a slice of unit tests to run on a parallelized CI agent.

Usage:
  dotnet-test-slicer slice [options]

Options:
  --test-assembly <test-assembly> (REQUIRED)  The NUnit test assembly to slice.
  --slice-number <slice-number> (REQUIRED)    The (1-based) index of the desired slice.
  --total-slices <total-slices> (REQUIRED)    The total number of desired slices.
  --outfile <outfile>                         File to write the .runsettings file to. [default: run-settings.txt]
  --test-filter <test-filter>                 Optional NUnit test filter query. []
  --balance-file <balance-file>               Optional test timings file used for load balancing. []
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information
